chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3330 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.15237/2018 2. For orders on M.A No.14988/2018 3. For hearing of main case 10.01.2019. Raja Muhammad Anwar, advocate for the petitioner **** 1. Granted. 2&3. Learned counsel for the petitioner after arguing the matter at some length does not press this petition and submits that petitioner would avail the remedy in accordance with law. In view of the above, this petition stands dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
